product: Splunk App Key Value Store (KV Store)
interface: storage/collections/data endpoints on the splunkd management port, app/owner namespaced

auth.scheme: Authorization: Bearer <authentication token> header on every request; the token never appears in URLs or error messages

paths.owner_rule: collection data is app-scoped; the owner segment is nobody for shared collections

query.params: query (URL-encoded JSON with MongoDB-style operators like $gt/$gte/$lt/$lte/$ne/$and/$or), sort (field or field:1 / field:-1, comma-separated for multiple), skip, limit, fields (comma-separated projection; field:0 excludes)
query.param_order_rule: splunkd always applies sort, then skip, then limit
query.omit_rule: unused options are omitted from the query string entirely
query.success: 200 with a JSON array of documents, each carrying _key and _user plus its fields

insert.body: the document; _key is optional and autogenerated when absent

update.body: the COMPLETE replacement document - KV Store updates replace the whole record; there is no documented ETag/If-Match conditional mechanism for collection data, identity is the _key in the URL

batch_save.body: a JSON array of documents; documents with _key update (same semantics as a single save), documents without _key insert
batch_save.limits: at most 1000 documents per batch_save request (limits.conf [kvstore] max_documents_per_batch_save default) and at most 50 MB per batch (max_size_per_batch_save_mb default); clients split larger saves into ordered chunks
batch_save.success: 200 with a JSON array of the saved _key values in document order
batch_save.partial_failure: chunks are independent requests: keys from accepted chunks stay saved when a later chunk fails; the client must stop at the failed chunk and report saved keys, the failing document index, and the splunkd message

export.stable_paging: a checkpointed export sorts by _key ascending, requests limit=pageSize, and continues with query={"_key":{"$gt":"<last delivered key>"}}; skip-based paging is not stable under concurrent writes and must not be used for exports
export.checkpoint: the checkpoint is the last delivered _key; a resumed export starts strictly after it

duplicate_key.text: An object with the same _key already exists in collection

kvstore_unavailable.text: KV Store is initializing. Please try again later.
